prompt: Create a bold cyber-anime music poster for AWAMI UMI. Use a 16:9 horizontal canvas with an electric cobalt-blue background and flat vector/silhouette styling. On the left, place huge black futuristic block text in two stacked lines reading the character name, with a heavy squared sci-fi font. Beneath it, add exactly 3 cyan triangular play-icon bullets with black text labels: “DIGITAL SOUND”, “PRIVATE PLAYLIST”, and “NEON BEAT”. Below the labels add exactly 11 small decorative elements in one row: 5 short diagonal cyan bars, 5 cyan dots, and 1 outlined cyan star. On the right, show a dynamic black silhouette of an anime girl floating or jumping as if dancing to music: long twin-tail hair streaming to the right, one hand near her head, cropped off-shoulder top, short layered skirt with straps, belts and dangling star charms, thigh straps, chunky platform boots, and cyan accent highlights on cuffs, hair clips, shoe details, and accessories. Include white earbud cables looping dramatically across the composition, connecting to a small cyan-and-black portable music player near the lower right; the player has a small purple equalizer screen, circular controls, and a white cable plug. Add exactly 2 separated boots/footwear silhouettes near the lower right, as if part of the energetic floating layout. Keep the design high-contrast, minimal-color, clean, graphic, and poster-like, using only black, cyan, white, and small purple equalizer bars. Avoid photorealism, avoid gradients except subtle blue background depth, and do not add extra words or logos.
